subcodes.first_line: O true promoter of the Faith, sincere guide, and glorious proof in the path of the Cause of God! In thy journey to Tehran thou didst endure the utmost hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبلغ حقیقی و هادی صمیمی و دلیل جلیل سبیل امر الله در سفر بطهران نهایت زحمت و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for protection
